Engage

Engage Pursuit Pro1 Power Series

Shape-flexible Pro1 line built for power, spin, and stable acceleration.

Useful as a comparison family: choose shape and thickness around how much reach, pop, and control you want.

TypeAll-court
Shapeelongated / hybrid / widebody options
CoreSpinCore / polymer control platform
FaceRaw carbon composite
Reference price$259.99
Price noteOfficial collection shows MSRP/sale variations by shape and thickness
Level3.0, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5
TraitsControl, Spin, Stability, Power
Used by / lineEngage pro/team users vary by season

Prices, sponsors, rankings, DUPR, and product availability change. Verify on the linked official source before publishing buying advice.

Prices, specs, and approved-equipment status can change. Treat this as a research dashboard and verify official retailer and equipment-list pages before purchase.
